name: Chocolate Peanut Treats
recipeInstructions:
1. In a bowl, combine the cracker crumbs and melted butter; mix well.
2. Stir in the sugar and peanut butter until combined.
3. Press the mixture into a greased 8-inch square pan.
4. Melt the chocolate chips using a microwave or double boiler, stirring until smooth.
5. Spread the melted chocolate over the peanut layer.
6. Chill for 30 minutes.
7. Cut into squares.
8. Allow to chill for an additional 30 minutes until firm.
9. Store in the refrigerator.
